title: Surgeon Vacancy at Ipca Laboratories - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Ipca Laboratories - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Ipca Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ipca Laboratories:
Ipca Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ipca Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
